patch_analysis: FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/planner/operators/LogicalPlanner.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['doExecute(', 'logicalPlan,', 'executor,', 'plannerContext,', 'consumer,', 'params,', 'SubQueryResults.merge(subQueryResults, valueBySubQuery),', 'false', ');'], removed_lines=['doExecute(logicalPlan, executor, plannerContext, consumer, params, valueBySubQuery, false);'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)

FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/planner/operators/SubQueryResults.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['', 'public static SubQueryResults merge(SubQueryResults subQueryResults1, SubQueryResults subQueryResults2) {', '// Correlated subquery related fields.', 'Row mergedRow = subQueryResults1.inputRow;', 'ObjectIntMap<OuterColumn> mergedBoundOuterColumns = subQueryResults1.boundOuterColumns;', 'if (mergedRow.equals(Row.EMPTY)) {', 'mergedRow = subQueryResults2.inputRow;', '}', 'if (mergedBoundOuterColumns.equals(EMPTY_OUTER_COLUMNS)) {', 'mergedBoundOuterColumns = subQueryResults2.boundOuterColumns;', '}', '', '// Regular sub-select field.', 'Map<SelectSymbol, Object> mergedValuesBySubQuery = subQueryResults1.valuesBySubQuery;', 'if (mergedValuesBySubQuery.isEmpty()) {', 'mergedValuesBySubQuery = subQueryResults2.valuesBySubQuery;', '}', '', 'SubQueryResults combinedSubQueryResults = new SubQueryResults(mergedValuesBySubQuery, mergedBoundOuterColumns);', 'combinedSubQueryResults.bindOuterColumnInputRow(mergedRow);', 'return combinedSubQueryResults;', '}'], removed_lines=[], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)
